相关PoC:
CVE-2026-31802: Demonstrate and analyze the CVE-2026-31802 path traversal vulnerability in npm tar, enabling arbitrary file overwrite via symlink extraction.

cve-2025-66398: Demonstrate exploitation of Signal K Server CVE-2025-66398 allowing unauthenticated attackers to inject backdoor and enable remote code execution.

相关PoC:
CVE-2026-2472-Vertex-AI-SDK-Google-Cloud: Expose and detail an unauthenticated stored XSS vulnerability in the Google Cloud Vertex AI Python SDK affecting versions 1.98.0 to 1.130.9.

CVE-2026-2441-PoC: Demonstrate a proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-2441, a high-risk Chrome use-after-free vulnerability in the Blink CSS engine.

item.title: CVE-2026-20841 - CVE-2026-20841 - 未命名漏洞

来源: Unknown

相关PoC:
CVE-2026-20841: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad via markdown links exploiting unsecured URL protocols.
CVE-2026-20841-PoC: 🛠 Demonstrate remote code execution in Windows Notepad versions below 11.2510 using the CVE-2026-20841 proof of concept.
